ontology_relation_candidates.label: homeTutoring
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a tutoring event to the student's residence where the tutoring takes place.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation captures a stable, reusable concept of tutoring conducted at a student's home, which is meaningful across multiple documents and not duplicating existing ontology properties.
